Needed to authenticate GitHub MCP. Create at github.com/settings/tokens with 'repo' scope

decisions.decision: Add Car form lives as slide-up overlay inside GarageCarsPage, not a separate route (/garage/cars/new)
decisions.rationale: User wanted it to feel like one unified place — tap +, fill form, car appears in carousel seamlessly
Add flow is now inside GarageCarsPage

decisions.decision: Garage icons: 126px, shadow behind icon (top:90), label marginTop:-20 to compensate for PNG transparent padding
decisions.rationale: Iterated with user to dial in exact sizing and spacing

decisions.decision: Garage header uses Cormorant Garamond italic 'Garage' + GT-style date badge (cream month / burgundy day)
decisions.rationale: User specified GT-style connected date tiles

decisions.decision: Home map icon nodes positioned as percentages of 390×800 canvas so they scale to any screen
decisions.rationale: Fixed pixel positions broke layout on real phones

decisions.decision: Garage hero image is full-bleed background behind entire screen with gradient overlay
decisions.rationale: User wanted image to fill whole page, not just top section

decisions.decision: Garage grid icons use real PNG files from src/assets/icons/garage/, no concrete tile background
decisions.rationale: User added real icons; removed GRADIENT_PANEL square behind them

decisions.decision: Username claim + onboarding coachmarks deferred until all 5 destinations have screens
decisions.rationale: Tutorial should point at real screens, not stubs

next_action: Fix GarageCarsPage — 4 issues: (1) Form layout must be non-scrollable, fixed-height, all fields visible on screen at once — redesign as compact grid, (2) Make/Model autocomplete dropdown not working well — ensure ilike query fires and dropdown renders, (3) Floor spotlight too low — move to ~50% height so it illuminates where car name text sits, (4) Overall form feels messy — tighten spacing, remove separate GarageCarsNewPage route confusion.
context_notes: Supabase project ref: uxqoernfrtgclpneirvc. Auth is fully working. Dev server on port 5174 with --host. App at ~/Desktop/g-dimension. GarageCarsPage is the unified carousel+add screen. The add form currently scrolls which breaks the app-like feel — it should be a fixed-height non-scrolling layout that fits entirely on screen. User wants it to feel native. Make/Model should show dropdown suggestions from vehicle_makes/vehicle_models Supabase tables (ilike query, trigram index). Nickname is optional (auto-generates from Year Make Model). The GarageCarsNewPage.tsx still exists as a standalone page but the primary UX is through GarageCarsPage overlay — consider whether to keep or remove. Context hit 92% this session — /clear before resuming.
